name: graph_streaming_encode_zero_edges_positional
description: Streaming graph encode with symbols but NO edges. SPEC 8.4: the graph trailer counts are the per-non-empty-group counts FOLLOWED BY the edge count, which is always the last entry even when it is 0. So a stream with 2 targets, 1 related, and 0 edges MUST emit counts=2,1,0 (not counts=2,1). This pins the 'edges always last' invariant that keeps the positional form unambiguous. Pairs with 009 (identical input, labeled trailer). Runners that do not implement graph-stream-encode skip this fixture.
